spacing_and_layout.strategy: Dense but structured. Uses CSS Grid heavily for data alignment.

button.primary: bg-[#238636] hover:bg-[#2ea043] text-white border border-[rgba(240,246,252,0.1)] shadow-sm font-medium px-4 py-2
button.secondary: bg-[#21262d] hover:bg-[#30363d] text-[#c9d1d9] border border-[#30363d] font-medium px-4 py-2

score_circle.description: The visual hero element of the result page. A large circular SVG with a glowing stroke.

verdict_tag.structure: flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 font-mono text-xs uppercase border

icons.strategy: Use line icons with 1.5px stroke width. Avoid solid icons to maintain technical feel.

visual_enhancers.background_texture: Minimalist grid pattern overlay (opacity 2-3%) on the main content background for a 'data room' feel.
visual_enhancers.glow: Use subtle colored box-shadows (e.g. shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(63,185,80,0.1)]) on active state cards or the score circle.
visual_enhancers.monospace_accents: Use IBM Plex Mono for all numbers, scores, timestamps, and verdict labels to reinforce the analytical vibe.

sections.name: Score & Risk (Hero)
sections.content: Circular Reality Score (e.g. 82/100) on the left, Risk Level and Category bars on the right.

sections.name: Claim Stats
sections.content: 3 bento-style metric cards (Verified, Suspicious, Unconfirmed) using grid-cols-3.

sections.name: Detailed Claims
sections.content: List of parsed claims with excerpts, verdicts, and source icons.

New_Check.content: Large textarea (bg-[#0d1117]), content type selection (radio cards), and 'Analyze' button.

language_dictionary.input_placeholder: Въведете текст, връзка или описание за проверка...

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs) and key data points (scores, tags) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-new-check-link', data-testid='reality-score-value').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes matching the hex codes provided (e.g., bg-[#0d1117]). Do not rely on arbitrary Shadcn generic theme colors unless customized.
Implement the 'Score Circle' as a custom SVG with stroke-dasharray/stroke-dashoffset to animate the percentage load.
Apply IBM Plex Mono to all data-heavy text (scores, tags, counts).
Ensure the sidebar is responsive (collapsible hamburger menu on mobile, fixed on desktop).
Use the Bulgarian language dictionary provided for all hardcoded text.
Include 'data-testid' attributes extensively to support robust testing.
For the glowing accents, use Tailwind arbitrary shadow values like shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(63,185,80,0.15)].
